arrivalChallenges.name: Floor is Lava
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel between safe spots without touching the floor.

arrivalChallenges.name: Balance Museum
arrivalChallenges.description: Children become 'statues', holding a balance until the coach claps.

arrivalChallenges.name: Shape Explorer
arrivalChallenges.description: Children explore making different body shapes around the space.

arrivalChallenges.name: Animal Safari
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel using different animal movements called out by the coach.

arrivalChallenges.name: Gymnastics Challenge Cards
arrivalChallenges.description: Children pick a card and complete the challenge shown.

arrivalChallenges.name: Secret Missions
arrivalChallenges.description: Children complete a hidden task written on a card or whispered to them.

arrivalChallenges.name: Cone Collector
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel to collect cones and bring them back one at a time.

arrivalChallenges.name: Gymnastics Dice
arrivalChallenges.description: Children roll a dice and perform the matching shape or skill.

arrivalChallenges.name: Island Balances
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel between mat 'islands', balancing on each one.

arrivalChallenges.name: Spot-to-Spot Travels
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel between marked spots using different movements.

arrivalChallenges.name: Travel and Freeze
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel freely and freeze in a shape on the coach's signal.

arrivalChallenges.name: Shape Hunt
arrivalChallenges.description: Children search the space for shape cards and copy the shape shown.

arrivalChallenges.name: Egg Rocks
arrivalChallenges.description: Children curl into an egg shape and rock gently from side to side.

arrivalChallenges.name: Teddy Rolls
arrivalChallenges.description: Children roll sideways across the floor in a tucked 'teddy' shape.

arrivalChallenges.name: Log Rolls
arrivalChallenges.description: Children roll sideways across the floor in a straight 'log' shape.

arrivalChallenges.name: Sideways Bear Walks
arrivalChallenges.description: Children travel sideways on hands and feet in a bear-walk shape.

arrivalChallenges.name: Hand-Foot Patterns
arrivalChallenges.description: Children practise the hand-foot-hand-foot pattern used in a cartwheel, travelling sideways.

arrivalChallenges.name: Statue Museum
arrivalChallenges.description: Children freeze in a balance like a museum statue when the music stops.

arrivalChallenges.name: Beam Explorers
arrivalChallenges.description: Children explore travelling and balancing along a low beam or bench.

arrivalChallenges.name: Jump and Stick Islands
arrivalChallenges.description: Children jump between mat islands and 'stick' the landing on each one.

teamGames.name: Hungry Hippos
teamGames.description: Teams race to collect the most balls/cones into their zone.

teamGames.name: Pirates' Treasure
teamGames.description: Teams travel to collect 'treasure' while avoiding being tagged.

teamGames.name: Builders and Bulldozers
teamGames.description: One team builds shapes/towers, the other knocks them down; teams swap roles.

teamGames.name: Obstacle Mission
teamGames.description: Teams complete an obstacle course linked to the lesson skill.

teamGames.name: Islands and Sharks
teamGames.description: Children travel between safe islands while 'sharks' try to tag them.

teamGames.name: Capture the Treasure
teamGames.description: Teams attempt to capture and defend treasure using the lesson's travel skill.

teamGames.name: Mirror Challenge
teamGames.description: Pairs mirror each other's shapes and movements.

teamGames.name: Sequence Builder
teamGames.description: Teams build a short sequence by adding one move at a time.

teamGames.name: Gymnastics Top Trumps
teamGames.description: Children compare skill cards and try to beat their partner's stat.

teamGames.name: Roll Relay
teamGames.description: Teams relay-race performing a rolling skill down the mat and back.

teamGames.name: Balance Relay
teamGames.description: Teams relay-race performing a balance at each station before tagging the next player.

teamGames.name: Stick Landing Relay
teamGames.description: Teams relay-race jumping and 'sticking' a landing before the next player goes.

teamGames.name: Shape Relay
teamGames.description: Teams relay-race making a called-out shape before tagging the next player.

teamGames.name: Team Sequence Challenge
teamGames.description: Teams perform a short group sequence combining the week's skills.

safetyRestricted: Headstands bearing significant bodyweight through the neck
Excessive continuous support work on hands
